title: Heterocyclic compounds as inhibitors of fibroblast growth factor receptor
abstract: Disclosed are heterocyclic compounds as inhibitors of FGFR-4 represented by formula (I). Also disclosed is a pharmaceutical composition that includes an inhibitor of FGFR-4. The compounds maybe used to treat diseases mediated with abnormality of FGFR-4 and /or FGF19, such as hepatocellular carcinoma and other forms of cancer.
